allow: PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { $node.Source }; $npm = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($npm\) { $npm.Source }; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\) { "Found at C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\) { ls "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" | Select-Object -First 5 })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\npm.cmd", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\npm.cmd", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\npm.cmd"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Host "Found: $p" } }; Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\", "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Users\\jeffb\\AppData\\Local\\Programs" -Filter "npm.cmd" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName)
